category_sources: Official homepage https://libzip.org/ describes libzip as a C library for ZIP archives.
source_facts.description says libzip is a C library for reading, creating, and modifying zip archives.
display_name_sources: Official homepage https://libzip.org/ uses the name libzip.
docs_sources: Official homepage https://libzip.org/ links to https://libzip.org/documentation/ and says libzip is documented via man pages.
repo_sources: Official homepage https://libzip.org/ links to the official GitHub repository https://github.com/nih-at/libzip.
tags_sources: Official homepage https://libzip.org/ lists archive reading, Zip64, compression, and encryption features.
source_facts.description identifies C and ZIP archive functionality.
